Official Presentation

Understanding the Ecosystem

"दोस्तों, 👆यह व्हिडिओ देखिए और कैसे हम दिन का सिर्फ 1 मिनट का काम करके, हर महिना 30 हजार से 3 लाख कमा सकते है"

Architecture

The Dual Engine

BG Wealth Sharing

Founded in 2018 by Stephen Beard, BG Wealth is more than a trading platform—it's a complete financial industry chain. Backed by a £30 Million guarantee fund established in 2024 to ensure member safety.

  • Blockchain & Digital Currency
  • Private Funds & Venture Capital

DSJ Exchange

The backend operational powerhouse. Bound by a 10-year partnership agreement, DSJ Exchange provides global, legally compliant trading infrastructure for all BG Wealth members.

  • US SEC & ASIC Australia Certified
  • Regulated in 30+ Countries (MAS, DFSA)

Official Documentation

Platform Analysis

Trading

The Trading & Compounding Engine

Learn about the 99.6% accurate Binary Options signals and how your capital doubles in just 55 days.

Read Document
Network

Team Income & Rank System

Discover the powerful 7-level team building system, welcome bonuses, and massive cycle rewards.

Operations

Withdrawals & Security Rules

Account Registration

Submit your details to receive your registration link and setup guidance via WhatsApp.

© BG Wealth Sharing Group. All Rights Reserved.

Document 01

The Trading & Compounding Engine

BG Wealth Sharing utilizes a highly sophisticated Binary Options Trading system to generate daily income for its members. The process is designed to be accessible, requiring zero prior trading knowledge from the user.

Daily Signal Operations

Members receive exactly two trading signals daily via the Bonchat application. These signals operate on the BTC/USDT pair and are timed specifically at 6:30 PM and 10:30 PM.

  • Incredible Accuracy: The system boasts a 99.6% accuracy rate.
  • Risk Management: Only 1% of your capital is used per trade.
  • Return Rate: Successful trades yield a 2X return on the traded amount.

For example, if you hold a $300 account, the 1% trade size is $3. A successful signal returns $6. From the $3 profit, 60% ($1.80) is your direct profit, and 40% goes into the company's reward system. This generates a daily passive income between 1.3% and 1.8%.

The 55-Day Compounding Magic

"By retaining your daily profits within the system rather than withdrawing, the magic of compounding takes effect."

According to BG Wealth algorithms, allowing your account to compound will double your total capital (2X) in exactly 55 days. A $300 account becomes $600 without any additional deposits, purely through consistent daily execution.

Document 02

Team Income & Rank System

While trading provides steady passive growth, the true financial explosion in BG Wealth Sharing comes from its unparalleled Team Income and Ranking System. The platform heavily incentivizes community expansion.

Welcome & Sponsor Bonuses

Whenever a new member deposits, instant rewards are triggered:

  • $300 to $999 Deposit: The new member receives a 5% Welcome Bonus. The referring sponsor also receives a 5% Sponsor Bonus. (e.g., on $300, both get $15).
  • $1000 to $10,000 Deposit: The Welcome Bonus remains 5%, but the Sponsor Bonus doubles to 10%. (e.g., on $1000, new user gets $50, sponsor gets $100).

The 7-Level Rank Progression

By building a team, you unlock massive One-Time Rank Bonuses and recurring 10-Day Cycle Bonuses.

Rank Requirement Rank Bonus (1-Time) Cycle Bonus (Every 10 Days)
Level 1 5 Direct Sponsors $100 $30
Level 2 2 Directs hit L1 (Team 25) $300 $150
Level 3 3 Directs hit L1 (Team 125) $800 $500
Level 4 4 Directs hit L1 (Team 500) $2,000 $1,200
Level 5 5 Directs hit L1 (Team 1k) $5,000 $2,400
Level 6 6 Directs hit L1 (Team 2k) $12,000 $5,000
Level 7 (Legend) 7 Directs hit L1 (Team 5k) $25,000 $10,000

Achieving Level 7 secures a $10,000 cycle bonus every 10 days ($30,000/month), fundamentally changing your financial trajectory forever.

Document 03

Withdrawals & Security Rules

To maintain the integrity and longevity of the £30 Million guarantee fund, BG Wealth and DSJ Exchange enforce strict, transparent withdrawal rules. The system utilizes a dual-wallet architecture.

The Dual Wallet System

1. Trade Wallet

Holds your initial deposit and daily trading profit. Used for executing the 2 daily Bonchat signals.

2. Exchange Wallet

Holds your network rewards: Welcome Bonuses, Referral/Sponsor Bonuses, and Cycle Bonuses.

Withdrawal Deductions & Rules

Withdrawals are processed instantly via Cryptocurrency (USDT, BTC, Ethereum). There are no manual delays, but specific deduction rules apply to ensure ecosystem health:

  • Trade Wallet (Pre-2X): If you withdraw from your Trade Wallet *before* your initial capital has doubled (reached 2X), a 20% deduction is applied.
  • Trade Wallet (Post-2X): Once your account naturally compounds to 2X, withdrawals from the Trade Wallet incur a 0% deduction.
  • Exchange Wallet: All withdrawals from the Exchange Wallet (Team & Referral income) carry a flat 12% deduction.

"The system is designed to reward patience. By waiting the 55 days for your account to reach 2X, you avoid the 20% early-withdrawal deduction entirely."
